data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a completion certificate contingent on 80% attendance. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that the system enforces this attendance requirement or that it tracks attendance accurately. While the use case mentions that Sarah attended 11 out of 12 sessions, it does not provide any details on how attendance is recorded or how the completion certificate is issued based on attendance metrics, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of attendance tracking mechanism or how the completion certificate is issued based on attendance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
